name: P0: Assistant confirm-create schedules event via docked chat
description: Logged-in user opens the docked AI chat, asks to schedule a uniquely named event, confirms Create event, and verifies the event on the calendar. Optional cancel cleanup.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click the Sign in button and wait up to 8 seconds for the dashboard to load
Ensure UI language is English (en) via the navbar language toggle if needed
Open the AI calendar chat with Open AI chat or Control+K / Meta+K and wait 2 seconds
Verify Ask your calendar panel is open
Type Schedule TS Confirm Create meeting tomorrow at 4pm for 30 minutes into the assistant input
Wait up to 8 seconds for a create preview card with Create event confirmation
Verify a create confirmation UI is shown (Create event badge/button, event title containing TS Confirm Create, or requires-confirmation style card)
Click the Create event button to confirm
Wait up to 6 seconds for success feedback
Verify success messaging (Applied successfully / Done) and/or the weekly calendar shows TS Confirm Create
Cleanup: type Cancel TS Confirm Create, send, wait 3 seconds, click Yes, cancel if shown
